name: Guesty Property Management API
what_it_does: Guesty REST API for short-term rental property management platform. Enables AI agents to manage listings across OTA channels (Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com, Expedia), automate guest communications, manage reservations and pricing, coordinate cleaning and maintenance tasks, and integrate rental operations data with analytics and payment systems.
use_cases: Synchronizing listings and availability across OTA channels from distribution management agents
Automating guest messaging and pre-check-in workflows from guest experience agents
Managing multi-property reservation calendars from operations automation agents
Integrating rental performance data with revenue analytics from reporting agents
not_for: Long-term residential lease management without short-term rental workflows
Hotel PMS without vacation rental channel distribution
Single-property hosts without multi-channel management needs
best_when: A professional vacation rental manager or property management company operating multiple short-term rentals across OTA channels wants AI agents to automate guest communication, channel sync, and operations management.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Guest data from Airbnb/VRBO is subject to OTA data sharing agreements. Automated messaging must comply with OTA platform terms of service.

auth.notes: Guesty uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials. API keys also available for server-side integrations. Scopes control access to listings, reservations, and guest data. Partner program required for marketplace integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-listing SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Lite, Pro, and Enterprise tiers based on property count; partner pricing for integrations
pricing.notes: Israeli company (Tel Aviv), global operations. One of the largest vacation rental PMS platforms. Partner marketplace for technology integrations.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: OTA guest data subject to Airbnb/VRBO data sharing restrictions
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 or API key
Automated guest messaging must comply with OTA platform terms — verify per channel
Channel sync is real-time and bidirectional — booking conflicts require careful handling
Partner program approval required for marketplace integrations
Israeli company with US/EU data residency options — verify for compliance requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: OTA guest data with platform data sharing restrictions. GDPR, SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with scopes. Israeli company with global operations.

security_score_components.security_notes: OTA guest data. GDPR, SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 scopes. Platform data sharing restrictions apply.
